headlines.title: After White House meeting, Mike Johnson says he and Trump are on ‘the same page’ to end legislative gridlock
headlines.description: The White House meeting came a day after Trump canceled plans to sign a bipartisan housing bill and urged Republicans to first pass his election overhaul bill.

headlines.title: GOP nominee for N.Y. governor says House candidate Brad Lander would be ‘a camp guard in the concentration camp’ for Nazis
headlines.description: The GOP nominee for N.Y. governor later said Lander, who’s running for Congress, would have been a “collaborator” with the Nazis. Both candidates are Jewish.

headlines.title: Some in MAHA movement express frustration over Supreme Court ruling on Roundup weed killer
headlines.description: One member of the “Make America Healthy Again” movement said the decision was "sickening" after the Supreme Court ruled that Bayer, the manufacturer of Roundup, did not need to warn consumers of a potential cancer risk associated with its weed killer. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports on the MAHA movement's frustration with the Supreme Court's ruling.

headlines.title: Brad Lander says Democratic divide is not 'progressives vs. moderates' but 'fighters vs. folders'
headlines.description: U.S. House Candidate Brad Lander (D-N.Y.) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss progressives' wins in New York City-area Democratic primaries after his own victory ousted incumbent Rep. Dan Goldman.

headlines.title: Supreme Court hands Trump Administration two major immigration victories
headlines.description: The Supreme Court handed the Trump Administration two major victories on Thursday, voting 6-3 in decisions regarding Haitian and Syrian immigrants. NBC News Senior Legal Correspondent Laura Jarrett and Senior Homeland Security Correspondent Julia Ainsley join Meet the Press NOW to break down how these decisions could deport thousands of immigrants.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: ‘The decision is sickening’: MAHA leaders feel betrayed by Supreme Court ruling on Roundup weed killer
headlines.description: The Trump administration backed Bayer, the maker of Roundup, angering prominent voices in the “Make America Healthy Again” movement.

headlines.title: DHS watchdog to review ICE detainee deaths, use of force
headlines.description: The reviews, announced Thursday, follow an increase in deaths at ICE facilities and a DHS inspector general’s report describing violations of use of force.

headlines.title: Democratic socialists’ battleground test: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Adam Edelman explains why Wisconsin is set to serve as a major test of the extent of democratic socialists’ newfound clout.

headlines.title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protections for thousands of Haitian and Syrian immigrants
headlines.description: The Trump administration has sought to terminate Temporary Protected Status for immigrants fleeing war, natural disasters or other catastrophes. Some may now be deported.

headlines.title: Supreme Court strikes down Hawaii’s ‘vampire rule’ for gun owners
headlines.description: The Hawaii provision required gun owners to, like Count Dracula, have explicit permission to enter certain properties when armed.

headlines.title: Democratic rift over the party’s future widens amid the left’s New York victories
headlines.description: But some in the party cautioned against taking too many national lessons from the successes of New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s congressional slate.
